/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/BSP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/VTFLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/VMTLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/BSPParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/MaterialSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/EntityParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/Skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/PlayerController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/PropStaticEntity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/BinfoParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/SoundKit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/AmbientGeneric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/miniaudio_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/TileRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/LightmapSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/GUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/PauseMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/MainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/MDL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/PropDynamicEntity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/ReflectionProbe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/TextureAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/BSPTexturePacker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/DualTextureAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/DXTCompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/MegaTexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/DepthMapGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/src/DepthMapAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/MikkTSpace/mikktspace.c.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VEEXEngine.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o VEEXEngine  -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation -framework AudioUnit libVTFParser.a libglad.a -framework OpenGL /opt/local/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/local/lib/libglfw.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
